text_block_list.text: HAH!
HI-YAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a lot of strange noises coming from the
arcade center, so I poke my head in to see what's
going on...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Darn. I'm still so far from beating the top
score.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I won't give up, though. No matter the challenge, I will complete this noble mission!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I will surely reign supreme over this boxing
machine!
choice_data_list: You're ready to go all out.
You're ready to go all out.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah, hello there. And of course I'm ready!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess must be strong. This is just one part of
my princess martial arts training!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes. A princess stands equal to a prince. She
must fight by his side and even save him on
occasion.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
For that, she must have two things—strength and
skills... Which reminds me! I have something to
ask of you.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I wish to get the top score on this boxing machine
but am having trouble. Do you have any pointers
you can share?
choice_data_list: Wind it up and go for a knockout punch!

How about imagining it's someone you want to
hit?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course! There's only one way to defeat a
mighty foe who refuses to fall no matter how
much you punch them...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And that is to steel yourself and give them a good
sucker punch right in the kisser!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Watch and see... this is the ultimate power of a
princess! Hiii-yaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Shining Princess Explosiiiive Fist!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wa-bam!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess lets loose a powerful right
straight while declaring the move's name. The
punch lands and breaks the record with flying
colors!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's a good point. I can't truly feel in the
moment if I'm punching without a true target.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case... Brace yourself, my dear prince!
Here I come!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course. What is a princess if she cannot best a
prince with her fist? Now witness my true power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A princess challenging a prince. Now that's a new
one... I'm sure Kawakami Princess will become the
kind of princess she dreams of being.
